name: Kiwifruit
summary: A small fruit with more vitamin C than an orange, gut-friendly enzymes, and enough naturally-occurring serotonin to show up in sleep research.
superfoodReason: Exceptional vitamin C density plus two distinctive, separately-studied benefits — the digestive enzyme actinidin and a measured effect on sleep quality.

benefits.claim: Very high in vitamin C for immune and skin health
benefits.mechanism: A single green kiwifruit covers a day's vitamin C. Vitamin C is a cofactor the body needs to build collagen (skin structure) and to support the function of immune cells.

citations.title: Vitamin C and immune function (Carr & Maggini, Nutrients 2017)

benefits.mechanism: In a 4-week trial, adults eating two kiwifruit an hour before bed fell asleep faster and slept longer. Kiwifruit's antioxidants and its naturally-occurring serotonin — a precursor in the sleep–wake cycle — are the proposed reasons.

citations.title: Effect of kiwifruit consumption on sleep quality in adults with sleep problems (Lin et al., Asia Pac J Clin Nutr 2011)

benefits.mechanism: Kiwifruit contains actinidin, a protein-digesting enzyme. In lab and human studies it speeds the breakdown of dietary proteins in the stomach and upper small intestine, which may ease the feeling of heaviness after protein-rich meals.

citations.title: Actinidin enhances gastric protein digestion as assessed using an in vitro gastric digestion model (Kaur et al., J Agric Food Chem 2010)

surprisingFacts.text: Kiwifruit is one of the few foods with measurable serotonin — about 5.8 micrograms per gram — enough that eating it raises the body's excretion of serotonin's breakdown product.

citation.title: Serotonin content of foods: effect on urinary excretion of 5-hydroxyindoleacetic acid (Feldman & Lee, Am J Clin Nutr 1985)

cautions.effect: Little of note. The acid and enzymes can tingle or irritate the mouth if you eat several, and kiwi is a common allergen for people with latex allergy.
